001/************************* PROJECT RON *************************/
002/* Copyright (c) 2026 StuyPulse Robotics. All rights reserved. */
003/* Use of this source code is governed by an MIT-style license */
004/* that can be found in the repository LICENSE file.           */
005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.PIDtoPose;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
009
010import com.stuypulse.robot.Robot;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Field;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Gains.Swerve.Alignment;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.util.HolonomicController;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.util.TranslationMotionProfile;
017import com.stuypulse.stuylib.control.angle.feedback.AnglePIDController;
018import com.stuypulse.stuylib.control.feedback.PIDController;
019import com.stuypulse.stuylib.math.Vector2D;
020import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.angles.filters.AMotionProfile;
021import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.booleans.BStream;
022import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.booleans.filters.BDebounceRC;
023import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.numbers.IStream;
024import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.numbers.filters.LowPassFilter;
025import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.VStream;
026import dev.doglog.DogLog;
027import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
028import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation2d;
029import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Translation2d;
030import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.FieldObject2d;
031import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
032import java.util.function.Supplier;
033
034public class SwerveDrivePIDToPose extends Command {
035
036        private final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve;
037
038        private final HolonomicController controller;
039
040        private final Supplier<Pose2d> targetPose;
041
042        private double maxVelocity;
043
044        private double maxAcceleration;
045
046        private boolean isMotionProfiled;
047
048        private final BStream isAligned;
049
050        private final IStream velocityError;
051
052        private final FieldObject2d targetPose2d;
053
054        private Number xTolerance;
055
056        private Number yTolerance;
057
058        private Number thetaTolerance;
059
060        private Number maxVelocityWhenAligned;
061
062        private VStream translationSetpoint;
063
064        private Supplier<Boolean> canEnd;
065
066        public SwerveDrivePIDToPose(Pose2d targetPose) {
067                this(() -> targetPose);
068        }
069
070        public SwerveDrivePIDToPose(Supplier<Pose2d> targetPose) {
071                swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
072                controller = new HolonomicController(
073                                new PIDController(Alignment.XY.kP, Alignment.XY.kI, Alignment.XY.kD),
074                                new PIDController(Alignment.XY.kP, Alignment.XY.kI, Alignment.XY.kD),
075                                new AnglePIDController(Alignment.THETA.kP, Alignment.THETA.kI, Alignment.THETA.kD)
076                                                .setSetpointFilter(
077                                                                new AMotionProfile(
078                                                                                Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Constraints.DEFAULT_MAX_ANGULAR_VELOCITY,
079                                                                                Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Constraints.DEFAULT_MAX_ANGULAR_ACCELERATION)));
080                maxVelocity = Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Constraints.DEFAULT_MAX_VELOCITY;
081                maxAcceleration = Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Constraints.DEFAULT_MAX_ACCELERATION;
082                isMotionProfiled = true;
083                translationSetpoint = getNewTranslationSetpointGenerator();
084                this.targetPose = targetPose;
085                targetPose2d = Field.FIELD2D.getObject("Target Pose");
086                isAligned = BStream.create(this::isAligned)
087                                .filtered(
088                                                new BDebounceRC.Both(
089                                                                Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Tolerances.ALIGNMENT_DEBOUNCE
090                                                                                .in(Seconds)));
091                velocityError = IStream.create(
092                                () -> new Translation2d(
093                                                controller.getError().vxMetersPerSecond,
094                                                controller.getError().vyMetersPerSecond)
095                                                .getNorm())
096                                .filtered(new LowPassFilter(0.05))
097                                .filtered(x -> Math.abs(x));
098                xTolerance = Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Tolerances.X_TOLERANCE.in(Meters);
099                yTolerance = Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Tolerances.Y_TOLERANCE.in(Meters);
100                thetaTolerance = Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Tolerances.THETA_TOLERANCE.getRadians();
101                maxVelocityWhenAligned = Settings.Swerve.Alignment.Tolerances.MAX_VELOCITY_WHEN_ALIGNED
102                                .in(MetersPerSecond);
103                canEnd = () -> true;
104                addRequirements(swerve);
105        }
106
107        public SwerveDrivePIDToPose withTolerance(double x, double y, Rotation2d theta) {
108                xTolerance = x;
109                yTolerance = y;
110                thetaTolerance = theta.getRadians();
111                return this;
112        }
113
114        public SwerveDrivePIDToPose withTranslationalConstraints(
115                        double maxVelocity, double maxAcceleration) {
116                this.maxVelocity = maxVelocity;
117                this.maxAcceleration = maxAcceleration;
118                return this;
119        }
120
121        public SwerveDrivePIDToPose withoutMotionProfile() {
122                this.isMotionProfiled = false;
123                return this;
124        }
125
126        public SwerveDrivePIDToPose withCanEnd(Supplier<Boolean> canEnd) {
127                this.canEnd = canEnd;
128                return this;
129        }
130
131        private VStream getNewTranslationSetpointGenerator() {
132                if (!isMotionProfiled) {
133                        return VStream.create(() -> new Vector2D(targetPose.get().getTranslation()));
134                } else {
135                        return VStream.create(() -> new Vector2D(targetPose.get().getTranslation()))
136                                        .filtered(
137                                                        new TranslationMotionProfile(
138                                                                        this.maxVelocity,
139                                                                        this.maxAcceleration,
140                                                                        new Vector2D(swerve.getPose().getTranslation()),
141                                                                        Vector2D.kOrigin));
142                }
143        }
144
145        @Override
146        public void initialize() {
147                translationSetpoint = getNewTranslationSetpointGenerator();
148        }
149
150        public boolean isAlignedX() {
151                return Math.abs(targetPose.get().getX() - swerve.getPose().getX()) < xTolerance.doubleValue();
152        }
153
154        public boolean isAlignedY() {
155                return Math.abs(targetPose.get().getY() - swerve.getPose().getY()) < yTolerance.doubleValue();
156        }
157
158        public boolean isAlignedTheta() {
159                return Math.abs(
160                                targetPose.get().getRotation().minus(swerve.getPose().getRotation())
161                                                .getRadians()) < thetaTolerance.doubleValue();
162        }
163
164        public boolean isAligned() {
165                return isAlignedX()
166                                && isAlignedY()
167                                && isAlignedTheta()
168                                && velocityError.get() < maxVelocityWhenAligned.doubleValue();
169        }
170
171        @Override
172        public void execute() {
173                targetPose2d.setPose(
174                                Robot.isBlue() ? targetPose.get()
175                                                : Field.transformToOppositeAlliance(targetPose.get()));
176                controller.update(
177                                new Pose2d(translationSetpoint.get().getTranslation2d(),
178                                                targetPose.get().getRotation()),
179                                swerve.getPose());
180                swerve.setControl(
181                                swerve
182                                                .getRobotCentricSwerveRequest()
183                                                .withVelocityX(controller.getOutput().vxMetersPerSecond)
184                                                .withVelocityY(controller.getOutput().vyMetersPerSecond)
185                                                .withRotationalRate(controller.getOutput().omegaRadiansPerSecond));
186                DogLog.log("Alignment/Target x", targetPose.get().getX());
187                DogLog.log("Alignment/Target y", targetPose.get().getY());
188                DogLog.log("Alignment/Target Angle", targetPose.get().getRotation().getDegrees());
189                DogLog.log(
190                                "Alignment/Target Velocity Robot Relative X (m/s)",
191                                controller.getOutput().vxMetersPerSecond);
192                DogLog.log(
193                                "Alignment/Target Velocity Robot Relative Y (m/s)",
194                                controller.getOutput().vyMetersPerSecond);
195                DogLog.log(
196                                "Alignment/Target Angular Velocity (rad/s)",
197                                controller.getOutput().omegaRadiansPerSecond);
198                DogLog.log("Alignment/Is Aligned", isAligned());
199                DogLog.log("Alignment/Is Aligned X", isAlignedX());
200                DogLog.log("Alignment/Is Aligned Y", isAlignedY());
201                DogLog.log("Alignment/Is Aligned Theta", isAlignedTheta());
202        }
203
204        @Override
205        public boolean isFinished() {
206                return isAligned.get() && canEnd.get();
207        }
208
209        @Override
210        public void end(boolean interrupted) {
211                swerve.setControl(
212                                swerve
213                                                .getFieldCentricSwerveRequest()
214                                                .withVelocityX(0)
215                                                .withVelocityY(0)
216                                                .withRotationalRate(0));
217                Field.clearFieldObject(targetPose2d);
218        }
219}
